'''Task Force Gemstone ''' was one of five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third Battle Group]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Gemstone was led by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Poqua]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Gemstone was placed under the temporary command of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] and paired with [[Task Force Copperleaf]] to form a combined task force under Commodore [[Mirx]]. It served in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]'s plan that culminated in [[Operation Strong Hand]].
